resultList.dtldesc: Property Details::::Presenting a fully furnished 3 BHK apartment for sale in the rapidly developing residential locality of Bachupally, Hyderabad. Designed as per full Vaastu principles, this west facing apartment offers a perfect blend of comfort, convenience, and modern lifestyle amenities. Located on the 4th floor of a well maintained residential complex, the property is ideal for families looking for a ready to move home in a well connected neighborhood with excellent social infrastructure.::::Property Specifications::::The apartment features 3 spacious bedrooms and 3 western style bathrooms, thoughtfully designed for comfortable family living. Two bathrooms are attached to the master bedroom and children's bedroom, while one serves as a common bathroom. The master bedroom comes furnished with a bed, while the home also includes a modular open kitchen equipped with cabinets, chimney, and hob. Additional fittings include geysers in the children's and common bathrooms, exhaust fans, mirrors, and an inverter for power support. Vitrified tile flooring is used throughout the living areas and bedrooms, while anti skid ceramic tiles are installed in the bathrooms for enhanced safety. The apartment also includes a balcony attached to the living hall, offering pleasant views of the landscaped garden and walking area.::::Amenities and Facilities::::Residents can enjoy a host of modern lifestyle amenities within the community. These include a fully equipped clubhouse, gymnasium, yoga hall, indoor games area, children's play zone, shuttle court, and volleyball court. The apartment comes with covered car parking and benefits from 50 percent power backup for common and essential services. Security is available round the clock with CCTV surveillance installed across common areas and on every floor, ensuring a safe and secure living environment for residents.::::Locality Advantages::::Strategically located in Bachupally, the property enjoys excellent connectivity to major parts of Hyderabad. Daily conveniences, educational institutions, healthcare facilities, and dining options are all within easy reach. Notable nearby landmarks include Keshava Reddy School, Astra Lumina School, Reddy's Laboratory, and Praneeth Pranav Antilia Villas. Popular restaurants such as Pista House, Kamini Restaurant, Thati Bellam Restaurant, and Khan Saab Restaurant are located nearby. Bachupally Signal is approximately 1 km away, while Pragathi Nagar is around 2 km from the property. Public transportation is readily available through RTC services, and the Outer Ring Road is located within approximately 5 km, ensuring smooth connectivity to key employment and commercial hubs across Hyderabad.
